creator: alessio.moretti@jrc.it
text:
I have a NEC CD-ROM 824 (ATAPI 8X) but it's not recognized from the 
installation program. The CD-ROM is connected as slave of the first HD.
I have tryed to connect it as slave of the second channel (the master is
a removable HD, but nothing has changed. How can i setup my CD-ROM?
Is possible to fine the driver for the Matrox Mistique? Is this video
card compatible with other drivers (not only standard VGA)?
Please replay me as soon as possible. Thank.

                                                     Alessio Moretti
